title: Job Opening Teacher at Pearson India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Pearson India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
